name: Apptica
description: Apptica — in-app advertising and mobile app analytics platform providing comprehensive ad intelligence and store analytics data to app marketers and game studios like Voodoo, Madbox and Kabam.

seo.title: Apptica — App Growth Tooling (ASO)
seo.meta_description: Apptica: Apptica — in-app advertising and mobile app analytics platform providing comprehensive ad intelligence and store analytics data to app marketers and ga

when_to_use: Spying on competitor in-app ad creatives and campaign networks
Identifying which ad networks competitors use for monetization
Store analytics for tracking game publisher download estimates
Benchmarking ad creative performance against top game studios

pros: Used by top studios (Voodoo, Madbox, Kabam)
Ad intelligence and store analytics in one tool
Strong creative tracking for in-app ads
cons: Pricing clearly tuned for game studios
Onboarding assumes you already know the domain
Occasional data gaps in smaller geos
review.verdict: Respected ad + store intel platform for game marketers, overkill for small non-game apps.
review.best_for: Game studios tracking ad creatives and store performance together
review.not_for: Tiny teams that just need basic keyword tracking
